name: Out of Your Mind
short_description: Immerse yourself in a hand-drawn, comic-style visual novel where your choices shape the storyline. Guide Lia through various decisions and emotions that lead to different outcomes. This original story and art present a take on a dystopian world, enhanced by an original soundtrack.
detailed_description:
We always understood why and how one experiences emotions, but we could never see why.

This changed, however, once a governmental medical institution made a discovery. A way to manifest human thoughts and emotions into a visible entity.

To monitor these entities, a Japanese prefecture has been turned into a labyrinth-like net of hospitals. All of this is for the sake of acquiring complete emotional stability through the removal of illegal emotional states.

In this environment, a young distressed student named Lia experiences her inner problems through many changes in her own manifestation of emotions. Can you help Lia cope with her emotions and her inner voice through your choices

...or will you give in to your negative thoughts?

Features:

  • A Hand-drawn game - a comic style visual novel

  • Branching narrative - your choices do make a difference; explore different emotional states Lia can find herself in through other available choices

  • Multiple endings - replay the game, and you may get a different ending; choices change the state of your "emotion scanner" you'll see pop up in the corner of your screen from time to time, maybe you can let it guide you

  • Minigame - a simple multiple-choice game of point & click, with elements that will help you get desired emotions; help Lia navigate through her feelings and focus on the wanted outcome

  • Original story and Art - a stylized approach to a dystopian world

  • Original soundtrack - musical ambiance for the exploration of an emotion-monitored world
